adHocDispatchDescription: Schedule a one-off visit (repair, warranty, etc.). Saved as an ad-hoc job for billing history.
addPaymentMethodFirst: Please add a payment method before subscribing to a paid plan
addPropertiesToRouteDescription: Search and select one or more properties. They are added to the end of the route in the order you select them.
addSelectedToRoute: Add {count, plural, one {# property} other {# properties}}
allPropertiesOnRoute: Every property is already on this route.
alreadyOnFreePlan: You are already on the Free plan
billingHistoryDescription: Your recent invoices and payment history.
bulkAddOnOtherRoutes: {count, plural, one {# property is assigned to another route and was not added.} other {# properties are assigned to other routes and were not added.}}
bulkAddPartiallySkipped: {count, plural, one {# was already on the route and was skipped.} other {# were already on the route and were skipped.}}
cancelSubscriptionDescription: Your subscription will remain active until the end of your billing period.
confirmCancelSubscription: Are you sure you want to cancel your subscription?
confirmDeleteJob: Are you sure you want to delete this job? This action cannot be undone.
confirmDeletePaymentMethod: Are you sure you want to remove this payment method?
confirmDeleteRoute: Are you sure you want to delete this route?
createJobAdHocHint: Schedule a one-off visit. Recurring stops are managed in Routes.
customerNameAndAddressRequired: Customer name and address are required.
dashboardOverview: Overview of your pool service operations
enterYourCredentialsToSignInToYourAccoun: Enter your credentials to sign in to your account
enterYourDetailsToCreateYourAccount: Enter your details below to create your account
generateJobsForDateDescriptionPattern: Creates jobs only for stops whose pattern matches that calendar date (weekday and weekly vs monthly). Skips properties that already have a route job that day.
inviteCodeDescription: Create an invite link or code for a new team member.
pendingInvitationsDescription: Unused invite links you can copy and share again.
jobsCardDescription: List of scheduled and completed service jobs.
jobsDescription: Manage service jobs. Defaults to this week; filter by weekday, route, source, technician, and status.
loginQuote: Manage your pool services with ease.
noJobsYet: No jobs yet. Create a job to get started.
noPhotosAvailable: No photos available for this job yet.
noPropertiesYet: No properties yet. Add a property to get started.
noAssignedRouteDescription: You are not assigned to a service route yet. Contact your company admin to get set up.
noRoutesYet: No routes yet. Create a route and add houses to get started.
noStopsYet: No stops yet. Add properties to define the route order.
noTeamYet: No team members yet. Invite technicians to get started.
onlyOwnersCanInviteAdmins: Only company owners can invite new admins.
propertiesDescription: Manage customer pools and property details.
propertyAndDateRequired: Property and scheduled date are required.
registerQuote: Join Cadenza to manage your pool service team, routes, and jobs in one place.
reportsDescription: View service reports. Filter by date range, technician, and property.
routeStopScheduleHint: Each stop has its own weekday and frequency
routeStopsScheduleDescription: Set weekday and weekly or monthly (1st–4th weekday) for each stop. Job generation uses these patterns.
routesDescription: Recurring routes: same technician, same houses week after week.
routesCardDescription: All routes configured for your company.
scheduleEffectiveFromHint: When you change weekday or frequency, a schedule segment starts on this date. Pending jobs on or after this date are moved to match the new pattern where possible.

settings.title: Settings
settings.trashDescription: Items removed from your company. They are kept in the system but no longer appear in the portal.
settings.trashForbidden: You do not have permission to view trash.
settings.messageTemplatesDescription: Email and SMS templates for customer follow-up. Link templates to issue types or set one default per channel.
settings.templateEmpty: No templates yet for this channel.
settings.templateFormHint: Use merge tags like {{customer_name}}. Leave {{issue_details}} for the admin to complete when pasting.
settings.templateMergeTagsHint: These are replaced automatically when copying from a job.
settings.templateIssueCategoriesHint: When a visit includes any of these issues, this template is used instead of the default.
settings.templateDefaultDisabledHint: Clear issue types to mark as the channel default.
settings.templateEnglishOnlyNote: Templates are in English for now. Spanish and other locales will be supported per template later.

shareInviteCodeOrLink: Share this code or link with the person you want to invite.
subscriptionEndedOn: Your subscription ended on {date}. You're on the Free plan.
teamCardDescription: Technicians and admins in your company.
teamDescription: Manage technicians and invite new team members.
technicianLimitReached: You've reached your plan limit of {max} technicians.
technicianLimitReachedAction: Upgrade your plan to invite more technicians.
noServiceReportYet: No service report submitted for this job yet.
jobsWithIssuesDescription: Visits flagged by technicians — review evidence and log office actions
noJobsWithIssues: No open issues — all caught up
noPendingJobsToday: No pending jobs scheduled for today
officeNotePlaceholder: What action did you take? (e.g. emailed customer, scheduled repair…)
copyTemplateHint: Paste into Gmail or your SMS app. Complete the issue section if needed.
billedTechnicians: {count, plural, one {# billed technician} other {# billed technicians}}
visitKindRequired: Choose a visit type for ad-hoc dispatch.
wizard-cadenza-final-description: Head to the dashboard to add properties, manage your team, and start scheduling service.
wizard-cadenza-overview-description: Use the admin portal to manage the core pieces of your operation. You can complete these steps now or come back later from the dashboard.
wizard-cadenza-overview-title: What you'll set up in Cadenza
wizard-cadenza-properties-hint: Add customer pools with addresses, access notes, and service details.
wizard-cadenza-routes-hint: Build recurring routes and weekly stop schedules to generate jobs automatically.
wizard-cadenza-team-hint: Invite technicians and assign roles so everyone sees the right jobs.
wizard-cadenza-welcome-description: Let's get your pool service company set up. You'll add properties, invite your team, and configure routes from the admin portal.
wizardSetupError: Could not complete setup. Please try again.
